cards.title: Logic
cards.governance_note: Use logic to make conditions, rules, inference, constraints, and correctness reviewable.

cards.title: Predicate Definition
cards.governance_note: Define predicates before embedding them in code, databases, workflows, or automated decisions.

cards.title: Contradiction Control
cards.governance_note: Check for conflicting rules, incomplete cases, and unsafe defaults.

cards.title: Inference Traceability
cards.governance_note: Preserve the path from premises, predicates, and constraints to computational output.
